did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a technical review that summarizes and evaluates existing deep learning advancements, datasets, and methods for skin cancer diagnosis. It does not present original experimental results obtained by applying a specific AI model to a dataset to generate new findings; rather, it synthesizes information from other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
